capabilities.name: Chart of Accounts
capabilities.description: Configure chart of accounts templates, account groups, account codes, types, and fiscal localization packages.
examples: Install a country-specific COA package
Create a new general ledger account
Group accounts for reporting hierarchy
Map taxes during localization setup

capabilities.name: Journal Configuration
capabilities.description: Configure journals, sequences, default accounts, bank accounts, and payment methods.
examples: Create a new bank journal linked to a bank account
Configure a sales journal with default income account
Set up a cash journal for petty cash
Configure journal sequences per fiscal year

capabilities.name: Invoice Management
capabilities.description: Manage customer invoices, vendor bills, credit notes, refunds, and invoice states.
examples: Create and post a customer invoice
Generate a credit note for a returned item
Send an invoice via portal email
Cancel and reset an invoice to draft

capabilities.name: Payments & Bank
capabilities.description: Process customer and vendor payments, payment methods, outstanding accounts, and batch deposits.
examples: Register a customer payment against an invoice
Create a batch payment for multiple vendors
Reconcile a partial payment
Handle a payment write-off

capabilities.name: Tax Configuration
capabilities.description: Configure taxes, tax groups, tax grids, report lines, and fiscal position mappings.
examples: Create a 20% VAT sales tax
Configure inclusive vs exclusive tax display
Map taxes with a fiscal position
Set up tax grids for tax report

capabilities.name: Bank Reconciliation
capabilities.description: Match bank statement lines with open invoices and journal entries using reconciliation models.
examples: Import a bank statement
Create a reconciliation model for recurring fees
Reconcile a bank line with multiple invoices
Handle an unreconciled difference

capabilities.name: Fiscal Positions
capabilities.description: Manage fiscal positions for tax/account mapping across regions and B2B/B2C scenarios.
examples: Create an intra-community fiscal position
Auto-apply fiscal position by country/VAT
Map domestic tax to export zero-rated tax
Switch accounts based on fiscal position

capabilities.name: Asset Management
capabilities.description: Configure fixed assets, depreciation schedules, asset categories, and disposal with Enterprise account_asset.
examples: Create an asset from a vendor bill
Configure straight-line depreciation
Post monthly depreciation entries
Dispose of a fully depreciated asset

capabilities.name: Financial Reports
capabilities.description: Generate and configure financial reports: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, general ledger, and aged partner balance.
examples: Run a P&L report by month
Configure balance sheet hierarchy
Export general ledger to Excel
Create a custom financial report line
